scripts.build:client: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$publish = '.\.artifacts\client-publish'; $target = '.\Tuss.Server\wwwroot'; Remove-Item -Path $publish -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; dotnet publish '.\Tuss.Client\Tuss.Client.csproj' -c Release -o $publish; if (-not (Test-Path $target)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $target > $null }; Remove-Item -Path (Join-Path $target '*') -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Copy-Item -Path (Join-Path $publish 'wwwroot\*') -Destination $target -Recurse -Force"
